segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Did you see the announcement for the new book on I did? It sounds interesting. They're reading a mix of poetry and modern fiction. and once a month they're going to invite authors to discuss their works. I've always wanted to hear authors talk about their writing process. Same here. Are you thinking what I'm thinking? I am. Let's do it.
